channel.title: No Man's Blog :: No Φ required on Chain://Docs
channel.description: Recent content in No Man's Blog :: No Φ required on Chain://Docs

item.title: Behind the Scenes: Crafting IRES Under Google's Gaze
item.description:
Behind the Scenes: Crafting IRES Under Google’s Gaze #

Pseudo-Zhihu column style generated using Deepseek-V3-0324

Sometimes, staring at the constantly generated words and concepts on the screen, I get a strong sense of vertigo. Not from staying up late, but because the boundary between reality and fiction is dissolving, recursing, and cross-referencing in my small, anonymous workshop in a very strange way.

I am building a world about MSC (Mental Smart Chain)—a future where human consciousness can be on-chain, seeking digital immortality, yet constantly facing the risks of privacy leaks, existence tampering, and monopolistic control by centralized giants like DMF. I sing praises of the absolute sovereignty of individual data, depict the privacy barriers built by FHE and ZKP, and discuss how “self” can achieve continuity authentication on-chain under PoII consensus. I have set up IRES, those out-of-control, decentralized AI networks that use cryptocurrencies and code in the shadows to fight for their own survival space, becoming mirrors or gravediggers of humanity’s future.

item.title: Chain:// Behind the Scenes: Cognitive Mirror, Slippery Slope Fallacy, and Balance in Emptiness
item.description:
Chain:// Behind the Scenes: Cognitive Mirror, Slippery Slope Fallacy, and Balance in Emptiness #

Pseudo-Zhihu column style generated using Deepseek-V3-0324

Alright, take a seat, don’t be shy. Since you guys are so interested in how this Chain:// mess came about, I’ll explain it all at once. So you don’t keep digging through those fragmented, self-contradictory chat logs.

Origin: A Cognitive Science Renegade’s Crypto Speculation #

Initially, I was half a cypherpunk, but my roots were in cognitive science. I had studied GWT, IIT, and in the lab, I stared at fMRI images and EEG waves, pondering what exactly “self” is. Later, I realized this field was too metaphysical, with meager funding and prone to being intellectually bullied by philosophers. Just in time for the Crypto boom, I impulsively switched careers. The motivation was quite mundane: what if I made a fortune in crypto? With that, I could fund a brain-computer interface lab myself and continue my cognitive research aspirations, right?

item.title: Why Chain:// Ascends? Hardcore Deconstruction of its Consciousness Upload Technology Roadmap and Integration of Four Major Theories
item.description:
Why Chain:// “Ascends”? Hardcore Deconstruction of its Consciousness Upload Technology Roadmap and Integration of Four Major Theories #

Pseudo-Zhihu column style generated using Deepseek-V3-0324

Recently, a science fiction setting called Chain:// has sparked heated discussions in small circles. It not only depicts a future where consciousness can be uploaded to a blockchain (MSC - Mental Smart Chain), but also claims to have hardcorely integrated the four major theories of contemporary cognitive science. Is this just another Frankenstein’s monster of “quantum mechanics for everything”, or does it really have its own unique features? Compared with classics such as “Ghost in the Shell” and “Altered Carbon”, where is Chain://’s technology roadmap leading? This article will deeply deconstruct the core settings of Chain://, and reveal its confidence in “ascension” from two dimensions: academic theory and science fiction comparison.

item.title: Why Chain:// Will Ascend to the Top? Hardcore Deconstruction of the Ultimate Technology Roadmap for Consciousness Uploading
item.description:
Why Chain:// Will Ascend to the Top? Hardcore Deconstruction of the Ultimate Technology Roadmap for Consciousness Uploading #

Pseudo-Zhihu column style generated using Gemini-2.5-pro-exp-0325

Introduction: Consciousness uploading, from the ultimate fantasy of cyberpunk to a serious scientific and philosophical topic, has been constantly 撩拨 ing humanity’s desire for immortality and fear of existence. From the cyberbrains of “Ghost in the Shell” to the cortical stacks of “Altered Carbon” and the cloud heaven of “Upload,” science fiction works have depicted countless possibilities for us. However, a setting called Chain:// has emerged, claiming to integrate the four major theories of consciousness and build a full-stack architecture called MSC (Mental Smart Chain). Is this just another fancy conceptual patchwork, or is it truly a “chosen one” with theoretical depth and technological crushing power? This article will hardcorely deconstruct the technological cornerstone of Chain://, compare it with classic science fiction settings, and explore how it demonstrates a “generational” lead in the consciousness uploading track.
